files_modified: src/integration/indexing-orchestrator.ts or equivalent populate path (wire extraction into index write)

risks.title: Capability/layer extraction may require schema change in index.json
risks.mitigation: index.json elements already have optional fields — adding capability/layer is additive and non-breaking

risks.title: exports_match_ast stale reduction may require @exports header template audit across 797 elements
risks.mitigation: Scope to top-10 stale files first (context-generator: 59 elements, tree-sitter-scanner: 57); batch fix @exports declarations to match AST

risks.title: Stale fix may involve regenerating many semantic headers — risk of header regressions
risks.mitigation: Run populate.js after each batch; compare stale count delta; stop if regressions appear

risks.title: WO-PARSE-CAPABILITY-LAYER-INTO-ELEMENT-METADATA-001 may already contain partial implementation
risks.mitigation: READ the prior WO's communication.json to understand what was done before implementing anything new

decision_records.decision: Address both gaps in one phased WO (capability/layer + stale count)
decision_records.rationale: Both stem from populate pipeline behavior; testing one validates the other; single populate run validates both

decision_records.decision: Stale reduction approach: fix @exports in top stale files, not @overwrite-headers run
decision_records.rationale: Prior scan confirmed --overwrite-headers alone doesn't reduce stale count; the issue is @exports mismatch with tree-sitter AST, not header absence
